characters.name: Hades' Carriage
characters.description: Chariot Hades' Carriage is an object from Hercules. Hades' commonly uses it for transportation, as seen when he rides toThe Underworld, or toMount Olympus. Hades' Carriage is black in color, with dark grey reins. It has a skeletal face in a shape similar to an angry drama mask. It has 2 wheels, also black. The backboard has sharp pikes emanating from the top of it, and it has a sharp, pointed end facing the reins.

characters.name: Hera
characters.description: HeraOccupationQueen of Olympus Hera is the mother ofHerculesand the wife ofZeus. She is pink with a magenta, shiny dress. She has orange hair and blue eyes. She has a magenta tiara. She is suitably glowing like all the gods.

characters.description: Megara "Meg"OriginalSoulOccupationCon Artist "My friends call me Meg. At least, theywouldif I had any friends." Meg saying what her friends would call her, albeit not having friends

characters.name: Mount Olympus
characters.description: Mount OlympusOccupationResidence of Gods Mount Olympus is the residence of the gods in ancient Greek myths and the 1977 movie Hercules. It is mounted upon a massive mountain which extends above the clouds, however; Olympus itself is actually atop a cloud and not the mountain itself. It is called Mount Olympus because the cloud rests exactly on top of it, or, above it.

characters.name: Mount Olympus

It is called Mount Olympus because the cloud rests exactly on top of it, or, above it.

characters.name: Pain and Panic
characters.description: Pain and PanicNormalSnake FormsOccupationLoyal Lackeys Pain and panic are one of the 11 antagonists of Hercules, the others beingThe Fates,Hades, andThe Titans. They are the servants of Hades, though they seem to be more willing to work against him rather than with him, as seen when they both buy Hercules merchandise. Panic commonly says "He's not gonna be happy" when he gets out of a certain situation, when Pain retaliates by saying "You mean,ifhe gets out of there." and Panic agrees by saying "If. If is good." and then take advantage of the situation by doing as much as possible before he escapes. Not much is known about Pain and Panic's background, but one can infer that they were loyal to Hades' before the events of the movie.

characters.name: Philoctetes
characters.description: Philoctetes "Phil"OccupationHero Teacher Philoctetes is a satyr hero trainer responsible for training Achilles and other famous heroes. He resides inside of the head of a statue. He goes by "Phil" for short.

characters.name: Philoctetes

characters.name: River of Death
characters.description: River Of DeathOccupationSoul Cage The River of Death is a recurring feature in Hercules, and is the destination for lost souls. AfterThe Fatescut their life span, their spirits float to The River.

characters.name: River of Death
characters.description: River Of DeathOccupationSoul Cage The River of Death is a recurring feature in Hercules, and is the destination for lost souls. AfterThe Fatescut their life span, their spirits float to The River.

characters.name: The Fates
characters.description: The FatesOccupationDeath-bringer The Fates are the harbringer of death. At the end of each person's lifespan, they cut their "string", that, in turn, ends their life. The soul then gets taken into the River of Death.

characters.name: The Underworld
characters.description: The UnderworldOccupationCage of Souls The Underworld is the domain ofHades, the god of the underworld. It consists of a large, skull-like structure where The Fates reside. It also houses the River of Souls. Occasionally, it's eyes, nose an pillars emanate a large, orange glow when Hades gets angry. It connects the floor to the ceiling like a large pillar. It could be the Underworld itself, or a part of it.

characters.name: Zeus
characters.description: ZeusOccupationGod of gods Zeus is the overarching god of Hercules, and the ruler ofMount Olympus. He has a child,Hercules, with his wife,Hera.
